name: CyberWire
description: Neon District terminal and HUD mode for netrunner workflows, command-line sessions, and high-clarity operator screens.

personality.visual_identity: cyan-heavy intrusion console with disciplined signal glow
personality.mood: jacking into the wire without losing readability
do_not: flatten the palette into generic blue-on-black terminal cosplay
wash every surface in full-bright cyan
hide warning or danger states inside the same glow language
merge visual intent with hardware execution
